34.reason: [Potential NullPointerException: If tokenLexer.getIsCorrect() returns true (no lexical errors), 'list' is never initialized and remains null, so adding parserError items will throw an exception.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Potential NullPointerException: If the above if-block wasn't executed (i.e., no lexical errors), 'list' remains null, causing NPE when adding parser errors.]

49.reason: [Logical error: This condition assumes that if there are no lexical errors and no parser errors, the program is correct. However, the earlier block only initializes `list` when there are lexical errors, so if there are only parser errors, `list` remains null, causing NullPointerException when adding parser errors.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Logic error: When there are only syntax errors (no lexical errors), tokenLexer.getIsCorrect() is true but GlobalParm.isParserWrong is true, so it incorrectly outputs to parser.txt instead of error.txt.]
